name: unraid-mcp
description: Query, monitor, and manage Unraid servers via GraphQL API through MCP tools. Supports system info, Docker, VMs, array/parity, notifications, plugins, and live telemetry.

settings.name: Unraid API URL
settings.description: GraphQL API endpoint for your Unraid server (e.g., https://unraid.local/graphql)

settings.name: Unraid API Key
settings.description: API key for authenticating with the Unraid GraphQL API
